staff_bm.title: Head of Department
researchInterests: analysis of mechanisms of action of drugs affecting smooth muscle
application of biophysical methods in pharmacology
brain–computer interface (BCI) research
physiology and bioelectricity of the nervous system
achievements: Supervisor of doctoral theses, mentor of the Student Scientific Society ‘Forum Biophysicum’, and co-author of science outreach publications.
Initiated the unit's renaming to the Department of Medical Biophysics (2025), emphasizing integration of basic and clinical sciences.
Under her leadership the Department entered a modern phase of development, combining the tradition of medical physics with research on nervous system function.
Represents a new generation of scientists—interdisciplinary, open to collaboration and technology.
bioParagraphs: Dr hab. Beata Modzelewska is Head of the Department of Medical Biophysics at the Medical University of Bialystok.
A biophysicist and neurophysiologist specializing in the pharmacodynamics of relaxants and interactions between the nervous system and smooth muscle activity.

staff_mk.title: Assistant Professor
researchInterests: assessment of public exposure to ionizing radiation
measurements of radon and radiocaesium concentrations in the environment
natural radioactivity of building materials and mineral waters
health effects of environmental radioactivity
bioParagraphs: Dr hab. Maria Karpinska is a biophysicist specializing in radiation protection and environmental radioecology.
Head of the Department of Biophysics from 2000 to 2019, continuing research begun by Prof. E. Trembaczowski and Prof. F. Rogowski.
teachingInterests: courses in biophysics, radiation protection, and radiation measurement methods
supervisor of numerous master's and doctoral theses

staff_mt.title: Assistant Professor · Research Coordinator
researchInterests: In search of the sunshine vitamin (2022) – on the importance of vitamin D
The microbiome guarding our immunity (2023)
Neuroplasticity (2023)
bioParagraphs: Dr hab. Marzena Tylicka is an assistant professor in the Department of Medical Biophysics and research coordinator.
She teaches biophysics and popularizes science, linking molecular biology, physiology, and public health.
sources: Department of Medical Biophysics, UMB materials

staff_tk.title: Assistant Professor
researchInterests: modeling of biophysical processes
computer analysis of experimental data
physiology of the nervous system
integrating bioinformatics with teaching
bioParagraphs: Dr hab. Tomasz Kleszczewski is a biophysicist and academic lecturer at UMB.
He specializes in physical and computational methods for analyzing biological processes and in biophysics education.

staff_ar.title: Assistant Professor · Course Coordinator
researchInterests: natural radioactivity of medicinal preparations (peat extracts)
radioactivity of water samples from northeastern Poland
polyphenols as modulators of gastrointestinal motility
achievements: 2018: Rector's Award, second degree (individual; as Dr Agnieszka Bielawska).

2014: Third-degree team award for studies on radioactivity of building materials and natural medicinal preparations (team: Prof. F. Rogowski, Dr A. Bielawska, Dr M. Karpinska, Dr B. Modzelewska, Dr M. Zalewski).
bioParagraphs: Dr Agnieszka Raciborska is a staff member of the Medical University of Bialystok (UMB).
She works as an assistant professor in the Department of Medical Biophysics and serves as Course Coordinator.
teachingInterests: course coordination—organization and quality of biophysics classes for medical degree programs
sources: Medyk Bialostocki 2018, no. 07 (162) – Rector's Awards list

staff_jk.title: Assistant Professor · IT & Investments Coordinator
researchInterests: radon concentration in air and drinking water
radiocaesium levels in mushrooms, honey, and soil
radioactivity of peat and mineral waters
monitoring of environmental radiation background
bioParagraphs: Dr Jacek Kapala is a specialist in ionizing radiation measurements and radiation protection.
He has long been associated with the Department of Biophysics and coordinates IT and investments.

staff_gk.title: Assistant
bioParagraphs: Dr inz. Grzegorz Kulesza is a scientific and teaching assistant in the Department of Medical Biophysics.
He specializes in measurement techniques, analysis of physicochemical properties of biological tissues, and support for laboratory teaching.

staff_ac.title: PhD Student
researchInterests: analysis of the effect of cinnamic acid on contractile activity of human gastric smooth muscle in vitro
achievements: Represents a young generation of scientists continuing biophysiological research begun in the Department in the 1990s.
bioParagraphs: Dr Andrzej Chomentowski is a doctoral student at the UMB Doctoral School.
In 2023 he won first place for presenting ‘Assessment of cinnamic acid influence on contractility of gastric smooth muscles in humans’ at the 6th International Medical Interdisciplinary Congress.

staff_bl.title: Technical Staff
bioParagraphs: MSc Barbara Lukaszewicz is a senior laboratory technician in the Department of Medical Biophysics at UMB.
She operates equipment, prepares teaching sessions, and supports biophysical experiments.

staff_mat.title: Technical Staff
bioParagraphs: MSc inz. Marta Trzos is a senior technician and laboratory specialist.
She maintains research equipment, workplace safety, and preparation of teaching stations.
